name: DOCUSIGN, INC.
business: Docusign sells subscription-based Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform, e-signature, and contract lifecycle management (CLM) solutions to businesses of all sizes globally, from enterprises to very small businesses.

exposures.sentence: Other capabilities include Navigator, our AI-powered agreement repository that helps customers manage and identify insights from their agreements, and Maestro, our no-code workflow builder that helps customers accelerate agreement processes.
Identity verification and SBS for enhanced signer-identification and signatures with digital certification
we continue to migrate our production services from our data center hosting facilities to Microsoft Azure Cloud, a third-party cloud provider.
Payments to collect payments along with signed agreements
Health and Life Sciences with eSignature modules enabling compliance with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's 21 CFR Part 11 regulations
Real Estate for eSignature, which allows brokers, agents and customers to manage the entire real estate transaction digitally

catalysts.event: Discontinuation of billings reporting and guidance starting in first fiscal quarter of 2027
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in the first fiscal quarter of 2027, we will no longer report or guide to billings.

catalysts.event: Change in customer classification to distinguish enterprise, commercial mid-market, and SMB on basis of annual recurring revenue
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2027, we plan to distinguish between enterprise, commercial mid-market and SMB customers on the basis of annual recurring revenue.
